calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Kent Gubbine. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-28-2002 Continued To Apr-22-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiffs in Propria Persona are each sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 4/22/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: JoAnn Bryce, #3321. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2001 Continued To Jan-22-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Each Plaintiff in Pro per is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 1/22/02 at 1:30 PM in dept. 212. Proceedings reported by: Valerie Papale. (212)
